CustomField.description: Current lifecycle status of this rate term's application. Pending = scheduled but not yet active. Applied = confirmed and live — engine reads this for accrual. Deferred = commercially delayed with Deferred_To_Date set. Waived_For_Period = skipped for one period (rate reverts to previous term). Superseded = replaced by a new Interest_Rate_Terms record via Loan_Amendment.
CustomField.label: Application Status
